channel.title: Posts on yizhi
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on yizhi

item.title: Hugo使用教程
item.description: 创建博客 hugo new page/blog.md 上传Github hugo --theme=hugo-theme-bootstrap4-blog --baseUrl="https://isyzhz.github.io/" --buildDrafts cd public git init git add . git commit -m 'comment' git remote add origin https://github.com/isyzhz/isyzhz.github.io.git git push -u origin master
